browserFallback: Primary playwright-chrome failed to launch (51 chrome.exe processes lingering); fell back to playwright-edge per protocol

cases.title: Address Popup Opens From Cart Shipping Details — Happy Path
cases.notes: Dialog role=dialog opens with heading 'Select address'. 4 columns (Address/Description/Country/Active), 3 facet dropdowns (country/region/city), search input, Add new, OK, pagination 1/2. 6 rows on page 1.

cases.title: Keyword Search Returns Filtered Results
cases.notes: Typed 'Delhi' → 5 matching rows (from 8 total). Network: currentOrganizationAddresses called with keyword:'Delhi'.

cases.title: Keyword Search Clear Restores Full List
cases.notes: Cleared input → 6 rows restored on page 1, page 2 still present (full 8+ addresses).

cases.title: Country Facet Filters Address List
cases.notes: Selected 'India 5' → 5 rows matched. Facet shows selected state (Country 1 badge). Network: countryCodes=['IND']. Country options: Australia 1, Bhutan 1, British Indian Ocean Territory 1, Colombia 1, India 5, USA 1.

cases.title: State/Province Facet Filters Address List
cases.notes: Selected 'California 1' → 1 row (LA address) matched. Label shows state NAME 'California' not regionId. Network: regionIds=['CA'].

cases.title: City Facet Shows City Name NOT Postal Code (Defect #2 Verification)
cases.notes: City facet labels: Delhi 5, Los Angeles 1, Paris 1, wegas 1, Ddftt 1, fhsxdhj sdtjh sdtjsfd_45634q6w34 1 — all city NAMES, no postal codes. Defect #2 fix confirmed in prod.

cases.title: Combined Facets (Country + State + City) Narrow Results
cases.notes: Applied USA × California × Los Angeles → 1 matching row. All 3 chips shown + Reset filters button. Network: countryCodes=['USA'], regionIds=['CA'], cities=['Los Angeles'].

cases.title: Column Sort NOT Wired (Defect #1 Bug Verification)
cases.failureReason: Confirmed — column headers not interactive: cursor:auto, aria-sort:none, onclick null. Row order unchanged after click.
cases.notes: VCST-4992 confirmed still unfixed — EXPECTED FAIL per task.

cases.title: Empty State When No Addresses Saved
cases.failureReason: No clean account with 0 addresses available. USER_EMAIL (Elena) has 8+, USER2_EMAIL (Mila) has 3, ORG_USER_PASSWORD unset.
cases.notes: Requires fresh account provisioning — deferred.

cases.title: Empty State When Filters Return No Results
cases.notes: Typed 'ZZZZNOADDRESS' → empty table. Empty state message shown: 'You do not have any addresses yet' — NOTE: this copy is MISLEADING when user has saved addresses but filter returned 0. Search input retained. No JS error. New bug candidate: empty-state should differentiate 'no addresses' vs 'no filter matches'.

cases.title: Select Address Updates Checkout Shipping Address
cases.notes: Clicked Colombia row + OK → popup closed, Shipping Details updated to 'egasegaws, wegas, 23523, Colombia'. GraphQL mutation AddOrUpdateCartShipment returned 200, no errors.

cases.title: Pagination Loads Next Page of Addresses
cases.notes: Page 1 shows 6 rows, page 2 shows 4 more rows (10 total). Network: after:'6' used in cursor. Page 1 addresses remain accessible via pagination.

cases.title: Aria-Label on Search Input (Defect #3)
cases.failureReason: aria-label still reads 'Search pickup locations' — BOPIS copy-paste artifact. Should reference shipping address context.
cases.notes: VCST-4993 confirmed still unfixed — EXPECTED FAIL per task.

cases.title: Mobile 375px City Facet Accessible (Defect #4)
cases.failureReason: At 375px viewport: Country button right=139.4px (visible), Region right=310.3px (visible), City right=401.9px — CLIPPED (26.9px past viewport edge). Horizontal scroll present on modal region.
cases.notes: VCST-4994 confirmed still unfixed — EXPECTED FAIL per task. Screenshot clearly shows CITY button clipped at right edge.

cases.title: Personal Account Shows Only Personal Addresses
cases.failureReason: Not tested with USER2 (Mila, personal). User-switching skipped for budget. However network evidence from USER_EMAIL (Elena/BMW-Group) confirms schema: GetCurrentOrganizationAddresses used for org users — implies separate path for personal accounts would invoke currentCustomerAddresses.
cases.notes: Deferred for budget — needs re-run with USER2_EMAIL.

cases.title: B2B Org Account Shows Org Addresses
cases.notes: Confirmed via network: Elena (BMW-Group org) triggers GetCurrentOrganizationAddresses with sort:'isFavorite:desc'. All shown addresses are org-scoped. First address has Favorite star indicator (default sort working).

cases.title: Account Addresses Page Still Functional (Backward Compat)
cases.failureReason: /account/addresses redirected to /account/dashboard — Addresses sidebar link is hidden for B2B/org users (per memory feedback_storefront_addresses_visibility). Test needs USER2_EMAIL (personal user) to validate.
cases.notes: Blocked — wrong user context. Page itself may still render for personal users — not tested.

cases.title: Company Info Page Address Widget (Backward Compat)
cases.failureReason: /account/company/info returned 404 'Page not found' for Elena (BMW-Group member). Sidebar links do not include any Company/Organization section — Elena is not an org admin, OR route was removed. Either way AC-12 backward-compat concern.
cases.notes: POTENTIAL NEW BUG or BLOCKED depending on user role requirement. Needs org-admin user (MULTI_ORG_USER_EMAIL) to verify route is reachable. Sidebar for Elena (org-member) shows: Dashboard, Orders, Quotes, Lists, Saved-for-later, Back-in-stock, Coupons, Notifications, Points, Profile, Change-password, Saved-credit-cards — no Company section at all. If company info is admin-only, that's by design. Marking fail because URL from test case 404s.

cases.title: Search Case-Insensitive Matching
cases.notes: DELHI → 5 rows; delhi → 5 rows. Identical match counts confirm case-insensitive behavior at API layer (AC-2).

cases.title: Duplicate Address Guard Shows Warning (AC-13)
cases.failureReason: Add New form opened (separate edit-address-modal dialog) with full country/state dropdowns. Full duplicate submission requires ~10 sequential dropdown + field interactions — budget constrained. Existing backend bug BUG-updateMemberAddresses-Single-Append-Dedup-Miss already documents server-side dedup failure for single-element submissions; UI-layer test would likely corroborate.
cases.notes: Deferred-exploration — requires country/state dropdown interaction cycle. Recommend re-running standalone with extended budget. Backend bug remains the primary evidence.

newBugsFound.title: /account/company/info returns 404 for BMW-Group member user
newBugsFound.notes: May be by-design if route is org-admin-only; needs confirmation. If it's gated, sidebar should not list it nor tests reference it. If universally expected per AC-12, this is a regression from PR #2219 composable migration. Recommend re-test with org-admin role.

newBugsFound.title: Empty-state copy doesn't distinguish 'no addresses' vs 'no filter matches'
newBugsFound.notes: Typing non-matching keyword shows message 'You do not have any addresses yet' — misleading because user has 8+ saved addresses. Should read 'No addresses match your search' or similar.
